title: Select
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Select wrapper composed from the local Base UI Select primitive, local class canonicalization, local SVG chevron/check icons, deterministic slot classes, and local static examples for demo, disabled, groups, scrollable, align-item, invalid, and RTL variants.

registry.reason: shadcn Select composes the local Base UI Select primitive.
shadcn Select uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for Select size options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Select implementation.
Origin chevron and check icons are represented by local inline SVG helpers in this batch.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic RTL example data.
Examples use local static Field shells to preserve Select demo output without adding composition scope.
Examples use local static label markup to preserve Select demo output without adding composition scope.
The align-item example uses a local static switch shell instead of importing another installable component.

examples.title: SelectDemo
examples.description: Default fruit select with label group.
examples.snippet:
export const SelectDemo = (): Html =>
  selectShell({
    id: 'select-demo',
    items: fruitItems,
    placeholder: 'Select a fruit',
    triggerClassName: 'w-full max-w-48',
    groups: [{ label: 'Fruits', items: fruitItems }],
  })

examples.title: SelectDisabled
examples.description: Disabled fruit select with a disabled item.

examples.title: SelectGroups
examples.description: Select grouped into fruits and vegetables.
examples.snippet:
export const SelectGroups = (): Html =>
  selectShell({
    id: 'select-groups',
    items: [...fruitItems, ...vegetableItems],
    placeholder: 'Select a fruit',
    triggerClassName: 'w-full max-w-48',
    groups: [
      { label: 'Fruits', items: fruitItems },
      { label: 'Vegetables', items: vegetableItems },
    ],
  })

examples.title: SelectScrollable
examples.description: Scrollable timezone select with multiple groups.
examples.snippet:
export const SelectScrollable = (): Html =>
  selectShell({
    id: 'select-scrollable',
    items: allTimezones(),
    placeholder: 'Select a timezone',
    triggerClassName: 'w-full max-w-64',
    groups: timezoneGroups,
  })

examples.title: SelectAlignItem
examples.description: Select with alignItemWithTrigger controls represented by local static switch markup.

examples.title: SelectInvalid
examples.description: Invalid select inside a local static field shell.

examples.title: SelectRtl
examples.description: RTL select example with local Arabic strings.
examples.snippet:
export const SelectRtl = (): Html =>
  selectShell({
    id: 'select-rtl',
    items: [
      { label: 'تفاح', value: 'apple' },
      { label: 'موز', value: 'banana' },
      { label: 'توت أزرق', value: 'blueberry' },
      { label: 'عنب', value: 'grapes' },
      { label: 'أناناس', value: 'pineapple' },
      { label: 'جزر', value: 'carrot' },
      { label: 'بروكلي', value: 'broccoli' },
      { label: 'سبانخ', value: 'spinach' },
    ],
    placeholder: 'اختر فاكهة',
    triggerClassName: 'w-32',
    dir: 'rtl',
    groups: [
      {
        label: 'الفواكه',
        items: [
          { label: 'تفاح', value: 'apple' },
          { label: 'موز', value: 'banana' },
          { label: 'توت أزرق', value: 'blueberry' },
          { label: 'عنب', value: 'grapes' },
          { label: 'أناناس', value: 'pineapple' },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: 'الخضروات',
        items: [
          { label: 'جزر', value: 'carrot' },
          { label: 'بروكلي', value: 'broccoli' },
          { label: 'سبانخ', value: 'spinach' },
        ],
      },
    ],
  })

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Select attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Chevron and check icons use local inline SVG helpers instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. The local SVGs preserve the icon slots, geometry, and aria-hidden contract.

deviations.summary: Examples use local static Field, Label, and Switch shells instead of importing adjacent shadcn components.
deviations.rationale: The Select slice stays focused while preserving the relevant Select DOM, class, ARIA, and visual contracts.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.

deviations.summary: Positioner and content expose side, align, offset, collision, and align-trigger attributes without runtime DOM measurement or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Measured collision behavior belongs behind a shared measurement service, not inside the shadcn render helper.
